name: Badge Access Control
description: Cedar policy set for employee badge access decisions

cedar_policies.cedar_text: permit(principal, action == Action::"enter", resource) when { principal.badge_status == "ACTIVE" };
cedar_policies.description: Allow entry when badge is active

cedar_policies.cedar_text: forbid(principal, action == Action::"enter", resource) when { principal.badge_status == "EXPIRED" };
cedar_policies.description: Deny entry when badge is expired
